title: luzula glabrata var. vera
intro: Luzula glabrata var. vera, also known as a type of woodrush, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Juncaceae. The medicinal properties of Luzula glabrata var. vera lie in its roots, which are used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Luzula glabrata var. vera are typically made by boiling the roots in water to create a decoction, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
